diagrams.title: Type Conversion Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows widening (implicit) and narrowing (explicit) conversions between primitive types
diagrams.purpose: Visualize data type conversion order and safety

diagrams.title: Upcasting vs Downcasting
diagrams.description: Inheritance hierarchy showing conversion between superclass and subclass references
diagrams.purpose: Understand reference type conversions in inheritance

diagrams.title: Primitive Type Promotion in Expressions
diagrams.description: Shows how Java promotes types in binary expressions before computation
diagrams.purpose: Understand automatic type elevation in expressions
